name: M365 DLP Policy Configured
description: Ensures Data Loss Prevention policies are configured and reviewed
query: SELECT id, policy_type, status, last_approved_date FROM policy_documents WHERE policy_type = 'm365_dlp' AND (status != 'approved' OR last_approved_date < NOW() - INTERVAL '365 days')
remediation: Enable Microsoft Purview DLP policies for sensitive data types and review them at least annually.
